name: Treasure Map
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>埋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蔵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>図</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only activate this card in response to the activation of an effect that would return this card from the field to the hand. Draw 2 cards from your Deck and discard 1 card from your hand.
eff: You can only activate this card in response to the activation of an effect that would return this card from the field to the hand. Draw 2 cards from your Deck and discard 1 card from your hand.
